title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool by Anthropic that can be run on Amazon Bedrock to enable code generation and development automation while keeping data within AWS infrastructure. The video covers setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and content governance via Bedrock Guardrails.
writeup: This video demonstrates running Anthropic's Claude Code, an agentic coding tool, on Amazon Bedrock so code generation and development automation stay within AWS infrastructure. It walks through setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and content governance through Bedrock Guardrails. The combination matters for teams that want Claude Code's agentic workflows while keeping data inside AWS and applying content moderation. Concrete takeaways include configuring cross-region inference and prompt caching, monitoring cost, and enforcing governance policies via Guardrails.
